(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)
DİLAN KUNT AYAN (Şanlıurfa) - Şimdi İsrail'le mi kıyaslayacağız Türkiye'yi?
KAMURAN TANHAN (Mardin) - İsrail'in pilotları hâlen Konya'da eğitim alıyorlar!
DİLAN KUNT AYAN (Şanlıurfa) - Türkiye'yi İsrail'le mi kıyaslıyoruz, anlamadım ben bu işten bir şey!
BAŞKAN - Tamamlayın lütfen.
Lütfen dinleyelim.
İSMAİL EMRAH KARAYEL (Devamla) - Evet, Türkiye adaleti sadece kendi sınırlarıyla sınırlı görmemektedir.
DİLAN KUNT AYAN (Şanlıurfa) - Yerle bir olmuştur, Türkiye'de adalet bitmiştir.
İSMAİL EMRAH KARAYEL (Devamla) - Mazlumun olduğu her yerde söz söyleyen, sorumluluk alan bir iradeye sahiptir
ve bu yürüyüş endekslerle değil milletin vicdanıyla ölçülmektedir.
Gazi Meclisimizi saygıyla selamlıyorum. (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar)
records.englishTranslation:
ON BEHALF OF THE AK PARTY GROUP İSMAİL EMRAH KARAYEL (Istanbul) - Mr. President, dear members of parliament; In Türkiye, executive power is surrounded by law. The administration is inspected with great care every day, at every stage, through the decisions of the Constitutional Court, reports of the Court of Accounts, the audit mechanisms of the Turkish Grand National Assembly and the independent judiciary. No authority that exceeds its authority remains outside the law. The state limits its own power by its own law. Public tenders are subject to the audit of the Court of Accounts and the prepared reports are submitted directly to the information of our Gazi Council. Ignoring this system where citizens can directly contact their state and claiming closed government is a reading made from the table, not from the field. Türkiye is a party to the European Convention on Human Rights.
DİLAN KUNT AYAN (Şanlıurfa) - We are on the field, and so is the field. What you see on the field is obvious.
İSMAİL EMRAH KARAYEL (Continue) - Violations in many areas, from freedom of expression to property rights, from fair trial to private life, are resolved through individual applications to the Constitutional Court.
DİLAN KUNT AYAN (Şanlıurfa) - There is torture on the field, there is lawlessness on the field.
KAMURAN TANHAN (Mardin) - Just last week, our social media accounts were closed by court decision. The accounts of one member of parliament were closed.
İSMAİL EMRAH KARAYEL (Continue) - The rule of law does not claim perfection, the rule of law reveals the will to see and correct its mistakes.
DİLAN KUNT AYAN (Şanlıurfa) - Where? You don't correct it, torture continues, ill-treatment continues, unlawful decisions continue.
İSMAİL EMRAH KARAYEL (Continue) - This will exists and works in Türkiye, and the picture is clear regarding the implementation of the legislation.
CHAIRMAN - Let's listen, dear MPs,
Please let's listen.
KAMURAN TANHAN (Mardin) - We are listening, President.
İSMAİL EMRAH KARAYEL (Continued) - The administration is obliged to comply with judicial decisions.
KAMURAN TANHAN (Mardin) - You are telling stories.
İSMAİL EMRAH KARAYEL (Continue) - In every case of non-compliance, compensation and sanction mechanisms come into play.
NEVROZ UYSAL ASLAN (Şırnak) - It is not implemented. How much compensation was paid for the decisions of the Constitutional Court and the ECHR?
İSMAİL EMRAH KARAYEL (Continue) - Thanks to mediation and conciliation practices, hundreds of thousands of disputes are resolved every year by the will of the parties and on the basis of equity, without being brought to the court doors. Appeals and avenues of appeal have been expanded and the presumption of innocence has been constitutionally guaranteed. Arrest is treated as an exceptional measure and the trial is carried out on the basis of freedom.
DİLAN KUNT AYAN (Şanlıurfa) - How can it be exceptional? They arrested 72 people in one file in one week! What kind of exceptionality is this?
İSMAİL EMRAH KARAYEL (Continue) - All these steps have been taken and will continue to be taken under the leadership of our President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.
NEVROZ UYSAL ASLAN (Şırnak) - 2 children were arrested in Şırnak. You arrested 2 13-year-old children! Is this an exception?
İSMAİL EMRAH KARAYEL (Continued) - This Assembly has constantly renewed the justice system with judicial reform strategy documents, human rights action plans and comprehensive law changes.

A reform process that is open to criticism but has a strong will is being carried out with determination.
Genocidal Israel is not included in this index. In the middle.
KAMURAN TANHAN (Mardin) - Because you are doing business with Israel, your government is still doing business with Israel. You are still making secret agreements with Israel.
İSMAİL EMRAH KARAYEL (Continued) - Israel's absence shows that there is a clear political choice, not a technical deficiency.
DİLAN KUNT AYAN (Şanlıurfa) - There is Israel.
KAMURAN TANHAN (Mardin) - You are making agreements with Israel.
DİLAN KUNT AYAN (Şanlıurfa) - Israel exists, it is not absent, it is further behind.
KAMURAN TANHAN (Mardin) - You are making agreements with Israel in Paris.
DİLAN KUNT AYAN (Şanlıurfa) - Mr. Minister also made a different comment about Israel, Israel exists.
İSMAİL EMRAH KARAYEL (Continue) - Today, while hospitals are bombed in Gaza, children are condemned to starvation, and civilians are massacred, ignoring Israel by a structure that presents itself as the measure of the rule of law is not defending justice, but escaping from justice.
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
DİLAN KUNT AYAN (Şanlıurfa) - Are we going to compare Türkiye with Israel now?
KAMURAN TANHAN (Mardin) - Israeli pilots are still training in Konya!
DİLAN KUNT AYAN (Şanlıurfa) - Are we comparing Türkiye with Israel? I don't understand anything about this!
CHAIRMAN - Complete it, please.
Please let's listen.
İSMAİL EMRAH KARAYEL (Continued) - Yes, Türkiye does not see justice as limited to its own borders.
DİLAN KUNT AYAN (Şanlıurfa) - It has been destroyed, justice is over in Türkiye.
İSMAİL EMRAH KARAYEL (Continued) - He has the will to speak out and take responsibility wherever there are oppressed people.
and this march is measured not by indices but by the conscience of the nation.
I respectfully salute our Veteran Council. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

records.title: CHP Grubu önerisi münasebetiyle
records.originalTurkish:
AK PARTİ GRUBU ADINA İSMAİL EMRAH KARAYEL (İstanbul) - Sayın Başkan, değerli milletvekilleri; Gazi Meclisimizi ve ekranları başında bizleri izleyen milletimizi saygıyla selamlıyorum.
Dün Şanlıurfa'da, bugün Kahramanmaraş'ta meydana gelen olaylarda vefat edenlere rahmet, yaralananlara da Allah'tan şifa diliyorum.
Türkiye, bölgesindeki bütün istikrarsızlıklara, savaşlara ve krizlere rağmen istikrar adası ve küresel bir oyun kurucudur. Özellikle son dönemde tırmanan İran, İsrail ve Amerika arasındaki gerilimde savaşın bölgeye yayılmasını engelleyen, taraflar arasında rasyonel bir diyalog köprüsü kuran ve bölge barışını önceleyen tek ülke Türkiye'dir. Dış politikamızdaki bu pozitif ve ilkeli duruş devletimizin dünyadaki ağırlığını perçinlemektedir. Vize serbestisi ve Avrupa Birliğiyle ilişkilerimiz Hükûmetimizin stratejik hedefleri arasındadır. Vize serbestisi için gereken 72 kriterin neredeyse tamamı tamamlanmış, inşallah önümüzdeki süreçte terörsüz Türkiye'nin hedefine ulaşmasıyla birlikte kalan teknik hususlar da millî menfaatlerimizden taviz verilmeden yoğun bir diplomasi trafiği
içerisinde çözüme kavuşturulacaktır. Vize randevularında yaşanan yoğunluğa Hükûmetimiz seyirci kalmamıştır. Dışişleri Bakanlığımız Avrupa Birliği makamlarıyla, ülke büyükelçileriyle sürekli temas hâlindedir. Bu görüşmeler neticesinde iş insanlarımız ve öğrencilerimiz için vize süreçlerinin hızlandırılması, kotaların artırılması ve çok yıllı vize verilmesi konusunda çok önemli ve olumlu gelişmeler kaydedilmiştir. Vatandaşlarımızın seyahat özgürlüğünü ve Türk pasaportunun saygınlığını korumak bizim asıl önceliklerimizdendir ancak vize meselesini ülkemizin dış politikadaki devasa başarılarını gölgelemek için bir araç olarak kullanmak hakkaniyetle bağdaşmaz. Sorunları diplomasiyle ve kararlılıkla çözen Hükûmetimiz vatandaşımızın mağduriyetlerini gidermeye devam edecektir. 2002 yılında 40 civarında ülkeye vizesiz seyahat edebilen Türk vatandaşları bugün 110'un üzerinde ülkeye vizesiz seyahat veya kapıda vizeyle seyahat edebilmektedir. Bu ülkeler arasında Arjantin, Brezilya, Japonya, Güney Kore, Singapur, Malezya, Endonezya, Arnavutluk, Bosna Hersek, Sırbistan, Karadağ, Gürcistan, Ukrayna, İran, Katar, Umman, Ürdün, Fas, Tunus gibi ülkeler yer almaktadır.
Bot hesaplarla ilgili de Dışişleri Bakanlığımız... Malumunuz, bu hesapların uygulandığı vize şirketleri anlaşmalı ülkelerle, anlaşmalı konsolosluklarla -anlaşma dâhilinde- bunları yürütmektedir ve bu sistemler onların kendi sistemleridir.
(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)
BAŞKAN - Buyurun tamamlayın.
İSMAİL EMRAH KARAYEL (Devamla) - Teşekkürler.
Bu bağlamda, ülkemizde faaliyet gösteren söz konusu anlaşmalı vize aracılık hizmetleri şirketleri bot yazılımlara karşı önlem olarak temsil ettikleri büyükelçiliklerin ve konsoloslukların onayına istinaden
aşağıdaki tedbirlerin tümünü veya bazılarını uyguladıklarını Dışişleri Bakanlığımıza bildirmişlerdir. Bunlar belirli ve güvenilir e-postalar ve alan adları üzerinden kayıtların yapılması, her bir kayıt e-posta için 3-5 randevu izni verilmesi, şüpheli veya çoklu erişim sağlayan IP adreslerinin otomatik olarak engellenmesi, kimlik doğrulanmasını güçlendirmek amacıyla yabancı kredi kartlarının ödeme için devre dışı bırakılması, maskeleme girişimlerini önlemek için VPN erişiminin tamamen engellenmesi ve dünyanın birçok hükûmeti için gerekli, geliştirilen, devreye alınan yüz tanıma ve doğrulama sistemlerinin uygulanmasıdır.
Bütün bunları yüce Meclisimizin dikkatine sunuyor, sizleri saygıyla selamlıyorum. (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar)
records.englishTranslation:
ON BEHALF OF THE AK PARTY GROUP İSMAİL EMRAH KARAYEL (Istanbul) - Mr. President, dear members of parliament; I respectfully salute our Veteran Assembly and our nation watching us on their screens.
I wish God's mercy on those who died in the events that took place yesterday in Şanlıurfa and today in Kahramanmaraş, and I wish God's healing to those who were injured.
Despite all the instabilities, wars and crises in its region, Türkiye is an island of stability and a global playmaker. Turkey is the only country that prevents the spread of war to the region, especially in the tension between Iran, Israel and America, which has escalated recently, builds a rational bridge of dialogue between the parties and prioritizes regional peace. This positive and principled stance in our foreign policy reinforces the weight of our state in the world. Visa liberalization and our relations with the European Union are among the strategic goals of our Government. Almost all of the 72 criteria required for visa liberalization have been completed, and hopefully, in the coming period, as a terror-free Türkiye reaches its goal, the remaining technical issues will be addressed in an intense diplomatic traffic without compromising our national interests.
will be resolved within. Our government did not remain a spectator to the rush in visa appointments. Our Ministry of Foreign Affairs is in constant contact with European Union authorities and country ambassadors. As a result of these meetings, very important and positive developments have been made in accelerating visa processes for our business people and students, increasing quotas and issuing multi-year visas. Protecting our citizens' freedom of travel and the dignity of the Turkish passport are our main priorities, but using the visa issue as a tool to overshadow our country's huge achievements in foreign policy is not compatible with justice. Our Government, which solves the problems with diplomacy and determination, will continue to alleviate the grievances of our citizens. Turkish citizens, who were able to travel to around 40 countries without a visa in 2002, can now travel to over 110 countries without a visa or with a visa at the door. These countries include countries such as Argentina, Brazil, Japan, South Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, Albania, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Serbia, Montenegro, Georgia, Ukraine, Iran, Qatar, Oman, Jordan, Morocco and Tunisia.
Our Ministry of Foreign Affairs is also responsible for bot accounts. As you know, the visa companies where these accounts are applied carry out these with contracted countries and contracted consulates - within the scope of the agreement - and these systems are their own systems.
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
CHAIRMAN - Please complete it.
İSMAİL EMRAH KARAYEL (Continuing) - Thank you.
In this context, the contracted visa brokerage services companies operating in our country are subject to the approval of the embassies and consulates they represent as a precaution against bot software.
They have informed our Ministry of Foreign Affairs that they have implemented all or some of the following measures.

These include making registrations through specific and reliable e-mails and domain names, granting 3-5 appointment permissions for each registered e-mail, automatically blocking suspicious or multiple access IP addresses, disabling foreign credit cards for payment in order to strengthen identity verification, completely blocking VPN access to prevent masking attempts, and implementing facial recognition and verification systems that are required, developed and put into operation for many governments of the world.
I bring all this to the attention of our great Assembly and salute you with respect. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)
